raw_consumer_statement:
American Express notified me of a potential fraud activity on my card. 

The alert said I could approve or decline and I declined charge. 

Then my card was locked so I called AMEX customer service. 

I told them the card/ # wasnt stolen and it was a subsciption that was cancelled. 

They harrassed me and insisted the card had to be closed although they had no justification for closing. I insisted it wasnt critieria to close the card by policy or law. They retaliated and approved the charge. 

I was forced dispute the charge which is on record in conversation and the mobile application of being unaoproved Ive had several calls since to get a tracking # for an internal investigation and have been harrassed, lied to and stonewalled. 

I finally got a supervisor to generate a case # after 20 minutes of her harrasing me and stonewalling. XXXX To AMEX legal and compoliance : your fraud and customer service departments are enemies of your company... all of them. The culture is rotten to the core.
